channel.title: Sundorica Product Feed
channel.description: Product feed for Sundorica's Facebook Catalog.

item.g:title: Coco Prints Vol 3
item.g:description: PACKAGE INCLUDES: Digital Printed Chiffon Dupatta 2.5 Mtrs Digital Printed Lawn Shirt 3 Mtrs Digital Printed Cambric Trouser 2.4 Mtrs

item.g:title: Unstitched Lawn
item.g:description: Embroidered Lawn 3 Piece Suit - Dyed Embroidered Lawn Center Panel 1 Piece - Dyed Embroidered Lawn Side Panels 2 Pieces - Dyed Embroidered Lawn Back 1 Piece - Dyed Embroidered Lawn Sleeves - Embroidered Motifs Border (for sleeves, trousers and back) - Embroidered front Daman border - Digital Printed Chiffon Dupatta - Dyed Lawn Trousers

item.g:title: Unstitched lawn 3 Pce
item.g:description: Embroidered Lawn 3 Piece Suit - Dyed Embroidered Lawn Center Panel 1 Piece - Dyed Embroidered Lawn Side Panels 2 Pieces - Dyed Embroidered Lawn Back 1 Piece - Dyed Embroidered Lawn Sleeves - Embroidered Motifs Border (for sleeves, trousers and back) - Embroidered front Daman border - Digital Printed Chiffon Dupatta - Dyed Lawn Trousers
